description: Profile-local MCP manifest for Galyarder. NotebookLM uses the single-home OS binary; runtime config.yaml remains the active source used by Hermes.
runtime_note: Do not remove mcp_servers from config.yaml until Hermes runtime explicitly loads profile-local mcp.json.

linear.auth_note: Official Linear remote MCP. Uses OAuth by default; supports Authorization header/API key if configured later.

notion.auth_note: Official hosted Notion remote MCP. OAuth user connection required; no headless bearer token for hosted MCP.
